name: Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and green pepper until onion is tender.
2. Stir in rice, water chestnuts, mushrooms, and soy sauce.
3. Cook over low heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in beaten eggs and cook for an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Cook cubed pork, beef, or lamb (if using) until desired doneness.
